name: Browser-Local Offline Reading List
required_commit_title: Release 216: add browser-local offline reading list

data/search-index.json.reason: Existing unmodified published local search data used by Search Facets.

data/site-routes.json.reason: Updated with the public reading-list utility route.

limitations: Saved items remain on the current browser profile and are not synchronized.
Offline caching stores selected route responses; external resources or media are not guaranteed.
Saving a page does not alter its source, review or completeness status.
GitHub Actions and deployed production validation remain pending until the commit and deployment run.
